actionUnits.condition: Scoremanager (MonoBehaviour, m_Script guid=f7de224e5fee443418417f9f2bfa2998) in Level2.unity. Start() sets AmountUI text; Update() updates Timer; changescore(int) increments score and calls WinLose.Winlevel() when score == winAmount.
